common.slogan: No lies. No shortcuts. Think for yourself.
about.brandTagline: Learn to think. Live with clarity.
about.title: Learn to think. Live with clarity.
about.introduction: Lifeschool is a private learning space where AI helps you examine choices, assumptions, and emotions without replacing your judgment.
about.missionBody: Strengthen self-understanding and lifelong learning through honest examination.
about.philosophyBody: Steward does not command or decide for learners. It supports human freedom and responsibility.
about.howBody: Ask a question, examine your assumptions, test evidence, and choose your next step.
privacy.title: Your conversation is your space
privacy.whatStoreBody: By default, learner conversations remain in browser memory during the current tab session.
privacy.whatNotBody: We do not create learner accounts for this alpha and do not persist chat history in this browser UI.
privacy.logsBody: Operational logs may include technical diagnostics needed for reliability and safety review.
terms.title: Use with care and responsibility
terms.limitationBody: Steward is an educational assistant. It is not a therapist, emergency service, or final authority.
terms.responsibilityBody: You remain responsible for your decisions, actions, and interpretation of outputs.
terms.availabilityBody: This private alpha is experimental and may change, pause, or become unavailable without notice.
contact.title: Help us improve this alpha
contact.intro: For feedback, bug reports, and collaboration requests, contact the Lifeschool team at:
contact.reportHint: Include your browser, route, and a short reproduction note when reporting issues.
home.introduction: Lifeschool is a learning platform where Steward helps you practice clearer thinking without replacing your judgment.
home.principleThinkClearlyBody: See what is real, not just what feels true.
home.principleUnderstandYourselfBody: Respect your feelings while staying curious.
home.principleLiveIntentionallyBody: Make choices that align with what matters.
home.valueGuidedLearningBody: Structured lessons that build understanding, not memorization.
home.valuePrivateSafeBody: Your conversations stay private. You control your journey.
home.valueHumanCenteredBody: Steward is here to help you think, not to replace your thinking.
home.valueIntegrityBody: Designed with a clear philosophy: teach how to think, not what to think.
learn.identity: Steward helps you examine questions honestly without replacing your judgment.
learn.limitation: Steward is not a therapist, emergency service, or final authority.
learn.emptyPrompt: What would you like to examine?
learn.emptyPrivacy: Your conversation stays only in this browser tab.
learn.messagePlaceholder: Write a question or describe what you are considering...
learn.memoryNotice: Conversation is held in browser memory only.
learn.clientUnavailable: I am not able to respond reliably right now. You may try again or stop here.
learn.quickPromptNextLesson: Give me one practical next lesson I should do now, and one question to test my thinking.
courses.introduction: Practice one clearer way of thinking, speaking, deciding, or reflecting.
courses.moduleDescription: Learn to slow down thought, examine claims, and separate facts, feelings, assumptions, interpretations, and conclusions.
courses.noAccount: No account or saved progress is required.
courses.learningNote: Learning remains an invitation. Your judgment and responsibility remain your own.
courses.lesson1Title: What happened vs. what it means
courses.lesson2Title: Feelings are real, but not always final evidence
lesson.exerciseIncomplete: Complete both fields to continue with your own example.
lesson.exerciseReady: Your exercise is ready to examine with Steward.
lesson.fieldNote: Your writing stays only on this page and is not saved.
lesson.practiceMemory: Practice conversation remains in browser memory only.
lesson.clientUnavailable: I am not able to respond reliably right now. You may try again or stop here.
lesson.completionRecords: Completion records practice for this page session only.
lesson.notComplete: Not marked complete in this session.
lesson.completeStatus: Lesson {number} is complete for this page session.
lesson.quickPromptNextLesson: Give me the next lesson-sized practice step based on my latest reflection.
